integrity.description: The output is a genuine mind map diagram

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's native save functionality

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new EdrawMax mind map diagram from scratch. The expected output path is exactly /home/ga/linux_kernel_mindmap.eddx. Required node labels include 'Linux Kernel', 'Core Subsystems', 'Process Scheduler', 'Memory Manager', 'Virtual File System', 'Network Stack', 'Device Drivers', 'Block Devices', 'Character Devices', 'Network Drivers', 'USB Drivers', 'Architecture Support', 'x86', 'ARM', 'RISC-V', 'PowerPC', 'Development', 'Linus Torvalds', 'LKML', 'Git Workflow', and 'Stable Releases'.
